title: Net Income Calculation: Pro Sports Inc. has fixed costs of 900000 and variable...
summary: Calculate net income by subtracting fixed and variable costs from total revenue.
prompt: Pro Sports Inc. has fixed costs of $900,000 and variable costs of $1,800,000. If they generate revenue of $3,600,000, what is their net income?
solution: Net Income = Revenue - (Fixed Costs + Variable Costs) = $3,600,000 - ($900,000 + $1,800,000) = $900,000. This helps in understanding profitability (Page 47).
